mapper.select: SELECT * FROM parent_student_relations WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM parent_student_relations WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND student_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO parent_student_relations (id, parent_id, student_id, relationship, deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{parentId}, #{studentId}, #{relationship}, #{deleted}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
